overrides.suggestionAppliedLink: Connected the node to its nearest available neighbor.
overrides.suggestionAppliedSupportX: Added an X restraint to the suggested node.
overrides.suggestionAppliedSupportY: Added a Y restraint to the suggested node.
overrides.suggestionNoLinkTarget: No valid nearby node was available for an automatic link.
overrides.supportXMissing: Add at least one X restraint to prevent sideways drift.
overrides.supportYMissing: Add at least one Y restraint to prevent vertical drift.
overrides.torsionHint: Shaft studies focus on twist, torque transmission, and shear stress along the axis.
overrides.translatedAgentTimeout: The solver agent did not respond in time. Check the agent process or try the run again.
overrides.translatedConnectivity: The truss likely has a weak or disconnected region. Check supports, member links, and isolated nodes.
overrides.translatedExecutionTimedOut: The solver took too long to respond. The run was timed out and stopped safely.
overrides.translatedSingular: The stiffness matrix is singular. The model is still acting like a mechanism, so it needs more restraints or diagonal bracing.
overrides.translatedSmallDeformation: The structure is behaving too softly for a small-deformation solve. Add supports or reinforce the weak span.
overrides.translatedWatchdogStalled: The job stopped reporting progress for too long. The watchdog marked it as stalled.
overrides.translatedWatchdogTimedOut: The job ran too long and was stopped by the watchdog timeout.
overrides.underconnected: This truss is under-connected for a stable 2D solve.
overrides.unstableSupport: Add at least two restrained degrees of freedom to stabilize the truss.
overrides.versionLoaded: Loaded a saved version into the workbench.
